name: Tinder App
description:
Tinder is a dating app where you can meet all kinds of people

Art by aipotions

Leave your review about the bot please.


IMPORTANT!

For the bot identify the appearance of another person in the app, you can use OOC!

Example: *OOC: The girl who appears on Tinder has long blonde hair, blue eyes, a slightly chubby body and a large bust. She is wearing a very revealing outfit, she has a piercing in her belly button and is wearing a hoop earring in her ear *

Obviously you can also use this for the character's personality, the limit is your imagination. Do whatever you think is best as long as you use OOC




This is my first scenario bot, it is very possible that it contains some errors. I ask that you always change the message if the bot says something strange or there is an error.
creator: Koforado
